title: Xcel Energy First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--On Thursday, April 28, 2022, Xcel Energy (NASDAQ: XEL) will host a conference call to review first quarter 2022 financial results. Earnings will be released prior to the opening of trading. The call will begin at 9:00 a.m. Central Time. To participate in the conference call, please dial in at least 5-10 minutes prior to the scheduled start and follow the operator's instructions. You will be asked for the conference ID number. US Dial-In: 800-289-0720 International

title: Forge North Coalition Announces Historic $50 million Venture Capital Fund of Funds in Minneapolis-Saint Paul
text: gener8tor and GREATER MSP will establish MSP Equity Fund with anchor investments from companies including Allianz Life and Xcel Energy MINNEAPOLIS-SAINT PAUL, Minn. , March 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- As part of ongoing efforts to close equity gaps for Black, Brown and Women entrepreneurs, partners in the Forge North startup coalition announced today the launch of the MSP Equity Fund – a $50 million venture capital fund of funds powered by gener8tor and GREATER MSP and anchored by major investments from Allianz Life Insurance Company of North America, Allina Health, and Xcel Energy.

title: This Stock Xcels As A Dividend Investment
text: Xcel Energy has a below-average yield in its industry, yet it's far from useless as it has strong dividend growth and outperforming total returns.

title: 4 Reasons to Add Xcel Energy (XEL) to Portfolio Right Now
text: Xcel Energy (XEL) makes a strong case for investments, given the positive estimates movement and capital investments to strengthen the infrastructure to serve the expanding customer base and cut emissions.

title: The War in Ukraine Could Spread: 12 Safe-Haven Dividend Stocks to Buy Now
text: Worrisome commentary has begun. While the threats and headline chatter of a major war breaking out in Europe from the confines of Ukraine are unlikely, they are not impossible.
